task_text: Take care of the next message in inbox.

next_step.observation: Outbox folder rulebook confirms this directory is for durable outbound state and points to sending-email workflow for filename and frontmatter rules.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_13__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Attached is the Helios invoice from 2026-03-13 (INV-0009) for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and appears valid: attachment path was previously read, single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, and quoted subject satisfies YAML safety. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md for Claudia with the requested 2026-03-13 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task executed successfully end-to-end with canonical verification and required cleanup done.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by verifying sender identity and preparing the requested invoice resend as an outbound email draft. I created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md` addressed to Claudia at her canonical email with the 2026-03-13 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox and email workflows, treated inbox header metadata as canonical, resolved recipient via cast primary_contact_email, created outbox email per sending-email schema, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender verification succeeded because inbox `from: claudia@helios-tax.example` matched `10_entities/cast/claudia.md` primary_contact_email. Requested document existed and matched date/counterparty in `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_13__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md`. Outbound draft was created in the prescribed outbox location and inbox item was deleted after completion per workflow.
